title: MARA Delivers Record Profits as Bitcoin Holdings Surge 197% to $4.6 Billion
text: Marathon Digital Holdings announced exceptional financial results for Q4 and full-year 2024. Full-year revenue: $656.4 million, up 69% annually. Q4 net income: $528.3 million, surging 248% quarter-over-quarter. Adjusted EBITDA: $794.4 million, up 207% year-over-year. Q4 revenue: $214.4 million, a 37% increase. The company achieved a 30.6% return on capital employed. MARA fundamentally reshaped its business model during 2024, accelerating transition to a vertically integrated energy and digital infrastructure company. The company secured approximately 1.2 gigawatts of energy capacity at 28% below industry rates and increased owned data center portfolio from 0% to approximately 70%. Bitcoin holdings increased dramatically to 44,893 BTC valued at approximately $4.6 billion, a 197% increase in bitcoin holdings. Management emphasized the HODL strategy and opportunistic BTC purchases benefiting shareholders. MARA's 2025 strategy focuses on three pillars: Generate, Activate, and Differentiate.
